summary: Core migration engine on track; API gateway integration delayed by 2 weeks due to vendor dependency.

milestones.name: Architecture Design Complete
milestones.description: Full system architecture approved by architecture review board.

milestones.name: Migration Engine v1.0
milestones.description: Core migration engine supporting VM, container, and serverless workloads.

milestones.name: API Gateway Integration
milestones.description: Integration layer connecting migration engine to external partner APIs.

milestones.name: Security Audit & Pen Test
milestones.description: Third-party security assessment and penetration testing engagement.

milestones.name: Staging Environment Go-Live
milestones.description: Full staging deployment with production-equivalent configuration.

milestones.name: Production Launch
milestones.description: General availability launch with customer onboarding support.

shippedItems.title: Core Migration Engine v1.0
shippedItems.description: Automated workload migration supporting VM, container, and serverless targets with rollback capability.

shippedItems.title: Database Schema Converter
shippedItems.description: Automated schema translation between SQL Server, PostgreSQL, and MySQL with index preservation.

shippedItems.title: Automated Rollback System
shippedItems.description: Point-in-time rollback capability with state snapshot and dependency graph awareness.
shippedItems.notes: Passed security review with zero findings.

shippedItems.title: Monitoring Dashboard MVP
shippedItems.description: Real-time migration status overview with progress bars and error summaries.

inProgressItems.title: API Gateway Integration
inProgressItems.description: Integration layer connecting migration engine to external partner APIs with rate limiting.
inProgressItems.notes: Delayed 2 weeks due to vendor API documentation gaps.

inProgressItems.title: Load Testing Framework
inProgressItems.description: Automated performance testing suite simulating concurrent migration workloads.

inProgressItems.title: Tenant Onboarding Wizard
inProgressItems.description: Step-by-step onboarding flow for new tenants with environment validation checks.

carriedOverItems.title: Custom Transformation Rules UI
carriedOverItems.description: Visual editor for defining custom data transformation rules during migration.
carriedOverItems.notes: Blocked on UX research findings; expected resolution mid-April.

carriedOverItems.title: Multi-Region Failover
carriedOverItems.description: Automatic failover to secondary region during migration if primary region becomes unhealthy.
carriedOverItems.notes: Network topology review pending with infrastructure team.

carriedOverItems.title: Compliance Report Generator
carriedOverItems.description: Automated generation of SOC 2 and ISO 27001 compliance artifacts post-migration.
carriedOverItems.notes: Deprioritized to Q2 per stakeholder alignment.
